best_tweet.author: mauricekleine
best_tweet.text:
PSA prefix your skill names with your domain

❌ `name: api`
✅ `name: <your-product>-api`

`npx skills add username/repo --skill api` will overwrite `npx skills add otheruser/repo --skill api` if both skills define `name: api` in their frontmatter!
